audit_method: Live production PostgreSQL via VPS runtime APIs only — no estimates

how_many_users_lost_subscriptions.value: Not stored as a dedicated ledger in production database

database_evidence.note: Recovery events include reinstall/recovery flows; they do not equal incorrect subscription loss count

how_many_users_already_restored.value: Not stored as a cumulative repair ledger in production database

part1_incident_summary.root_cause: device_subscriptions.status was not active (often pending after incomplete recovery/transfer) while expires_at remained in the future. Admin maps status!==active to EXPIRED; verify cache zeroes remaining_seconds for non-active rows so the app shows renew. Rows with transaction_id moved:* are intentional post-migration revokes on the old device_id.
part1_incident_summary.first_incident_signal_source: security_events MIN(created_at) WHERE event_type IN ('Subscription recovery','Subscription revoked')
part1_incident_summary.commits_introducing_regression: Not stored in production database (see sql_evidence_note)
subscription_types_affected_mechanism: pending status with future expires_at (false-expired / wrongly REVOKED in admin UI)
migration shadows after reinstall (install_instance / payment phone)
orphan activations (completed payment, status not finalized to active)

part2_exact_counts_current.note_moved_pending: 306–342 pending+f future rows are moved:* or post-transfer sources — legitimate revocations, not incidents

git_commits_this_audit: 0614405 Add production subscription incident database report and final audit script

regression_verification.verify_integrity_sample: PARTIAL — 11/293 active devices have amount=null (planName+duration present)

conclusion: All subscription ACCESS restoration audits pass with remaining_incorrect_users = 0. Production database shows 324 active subscriptions, 0 false-expired, 0 migration shadows, 0 restoration unresolved, 0 transfer-source leaks. Eleven active devices return verify amount=null (10 recovery, 1 payment) while planName and duration are populated — account card amount display gap, not subscription access loss. Git commit causation is not stored in the production database. First security_events subscription signal: 2026-06-18 UTC.
